title: Programming_ Programming in C - Switch Case

questions.question:
Consider the following C program:

#include<stdio.h>
int main()
{
    int i, j, k = 0;
    j=2 * 3 / 4 + 2.0 / 5 + 8 / 5;
    k-=--j;
    for (i=0; i<5; i++)
    {
        switch(i+k)
        {
            case 1: 
            case 2: printf("\n%d", i+k);
            case 3: printf("\n%d", i+k);
            default: printf("\n%d", i+k);
        }
    }
    return 0;
}

The number of times printf statement is executed is _______.



GATE CSE 2015 Set 3 | Question: 48
